build.buildCommand: COMPOSER_ALLOW_SUPERUSER=1 composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction --no-scripts && npx vite build && mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache,testing} storage/logs bootstrap/cache && chmod -R a+rw storage

deploy.startCommand: bash railway.sh ; php -c php.ini -d post_max_size=60M -d upload_max_filesize=20M -d max_file_uploads=40 -d memory_limit=256M -d max_execution_time=120 -S 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8080} server.php
